# www.sighthound.com — robots.txt
# Served by the accept-markdown Cloudflare Worker, overriding
# Squarespace's auto-generated default.
# Last updated: 2026-04-23
# Canonical AI agent help: https://www.sighthound.com/llms.txt
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# ── AI agent help (llms.txt discoverability) ──────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

# ── Default policy: allow everything except admin/test paths ────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /config
Disallow: /search
Disallow: /account$
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /commerce/digital-download/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /static/
Disallow: /*?author=*
Disallow: /*&author=*
Disallow: /*?tag=*
Disallow: /*&tag=*
Disallow: /*?month=*
Disallow: /*&month=*
Disallow: /*?view=*
Disallow: /*&view=*
Disallow: /*?format=json
Disallow: /*&format=json
Disallow: /*?format=page-context
Disallow: /*&format=page-context
Disallow: /*?format=main-content
Disallow: /*&format=main-content
Disallow: /*?format=json-pretty
Disallow: /*&format=json-pretty
Disallow: /*?format=ical
Disallow: /*&format=ical
Disallow: /*?reversePaginate=*
Disallow: /*&reversePaginate=*
